title: Solo Craft: Reawakening
description: Unofficial Manwha/Anime Solo Leveling Mod for Minecraft with gates, dungeons, weapons, classes and etc.
body:
![Solo Leveling Reawakening](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1631ceeb5d86fa0a9afcade2c8e0085ae6edb117.png)

# This is a Unofficial Solo Leveling Manwha/Anime series mod for minecraft.

GeckoLib, Curios API, Player Animator, Cloth ConfigAPI

[Developer Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@efkrdnz)

[Discord](https://discord.gg/9gw6Tu8Cx9)

[Discord Link in case first one is expired](https://discord.gg/36ejJENP74)

Competible with Better Combat

The way this mod works is you gain XP by killing monsters and Level up.

 
![System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb70137f64b5db85f6d711a9e82380b0ac8d57f6.png)
 

You have the power of the "system" so you can keep leveling up and increase your stats to get stronger!

There are:

    Vitality (Increases your maximum health and reduces damage you take)
    Strength (Increases your attack strength)
    Intelligence (Increases your mana capacity)
    Sense (Increases the chance of dodging attacks and awareness of mobs around)
    Agility (Increases the sprint speed)

 ![Daily Quests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b68f081822c944085502b9cb2eba8b68f15b7e5.png)

There are daily quests that are present in system's "Active Quests" Tab.

Make sure to do your daily quests else you will be teleported into Punishment Zone

If you successfully complete a daily quest you will be awarded with 1 of the 3 Rewards of Choice

Them being:

    Full Recovery (Resets your fatigue and heals you up to maximum health while removing negative effects)
    Random Lootbox (Gives you a random item <You will need to select this to progress through some quests.>
    10 Skill Points (Gives you 10 skill points for you to spend on system

If you manage to survive the punishment zone you will be awarded with the same rewards as well.

Be careful if your daily quest becomes a <s>secret quest!!</s>

 
![Dungeons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be9d884cfefd9f012780a9bf2fa27672bdc048ac.png)
 

There are gates spawning out in the world that connects our world to another dimensions.

These gates can vary in size but larger size doesn't mean it holds more dangerous dungeons.

 

 

Gates have limited time so be carefull!


If you dont close a gate before its rime runs out There will be a Dungeon Break

 

 
![Bosses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37ce1deca8cf819aab4446457b82f4d879614675.png)
 

There are currently:
- Igris
- Beru
- Baruka
- Kamish
- Goblin King
- Gem Golem
- Giant Spider
- Kasaka

As Bosses

Sources of bought models:
Kasaka and Kasaka's Venom Fang: https://mcmodels.net/products/11890/solocraft-v1
New Sword and Daggers: https://mcmodels.net/products/8896/mega-weapon-bundle
Dungeon Decoration Blocks: https://mcmodels.net/products/9242/dungeon-megapack
https://mcmodels.net/products/10122/dungeon-decoration-pack-volume-1
https://mcmodels.net/products/10578/dungeon-decorations-v2
